129245061.text:
*WAAAAAAHHHHH!* 😭

*cry cry cry*

Ohhhhh! I cry! I cry! 

*whimper whimper*

WAAAAAHHHHH! 👶

6422938.text: Oh my! It's time! Let me bring our baby into the world!

73769453.text:
🎉 **Congratulations!** Baby has arrived! 

I'm so relieved and overjoyed! After all this time, our precious little one is finally here. The labor was intense, but it was all worth it to meet our beautiful baby! 

*holds baby close*

Welcome to the world, sweet one! 💕👶
